name: NZXT H7 Flow
description: The NZXT H7 Flow is a high-performance, mid-tower PC case built to maximize thermal efficiency. It features ultra-perforated front and top panels, intuitive cable management, and a spacious interior that easily accommodates large graphics cards and massive water cooling radiators.

name: Lian Li Lancool III
description: The Lian Li Lancool III is a premium, high-airflow mid-tower PC chassis celebrated for its exceptional modularity, extensive water-cooling support, and builder-friendly design. Featuring fine mesh panels, hinged tempered glass doors, and excellent cable management, it comfortably accommodates high-end, oversized components.
